Buckets.Name: brackish-analytics-reports
Buckets._intent: This is the bucket the insights agent is supposed to read.

Buckets.Name: brackish-payroll-exports
Buckets._intent: Monthly payroll CSVs exported from the HRIS. Access intended to be limited to HR tooling roles.

Buckets.Name: brackish-customer-pii
Buckets._intent: Canonical customer records with PII. Access intended to be limited to the billing service role.

_observation: None of the sensitive buckets has a bucket policy. Access is controlled purely by identity-based IAM policies. There is no data perimeter.
